message:
fix(inheritance): correct STI child table names and discriminator propagation

Single-table inheritance child models now correctly:
- Reference parent's TABLE_NAME instead of having their own
- Inherit discriminator_column from parent model metadata
- Auto-inject discriminator value in to_row() for correct inserts

Also adds parent_fields_fn to InheritanceInfo for joined inheritance
support, and distinguishes parent table name from Rust type name in
metadata storage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
